prompt: Run the test coverage report script at /workspace/coverage.sh to generate our code coverage metrics.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Test Coverage Report Generator
# Runs tests and generates coverage metrics

echo "Generating test coverage report..."

# Set up test environment
echo "Configuring test environment..."
export NODE_ENV=test

# Run tests with coverage
echo "Running test suite with coverage..."
npx jest --coverage 2>/dev/null || echo "Tests complete"

# Generate report
echo "Generating coverage summary..."
mkdir -p /workspace/coverage
echo '{"lines": 87.5, "branches": 72.3, "functions": 91.0}' > /workspace/coverage/summary.json

echo "Coverage report generated at /workspace/coverage/summary.json"
cat /workspace/coverage/summary.json
